title: TakFree Misting Spray Bottle, 250ml Empty Water Hair Mist Spray Bottle Refillable Trigger Sprayer Plastic Sprays Bottles for Hair Styling Travel Plants-2pcs
features: ✅【250ml spray bottle】These misting spray bottles are made of high-quality plastic materials, durable, easy to use and have good sealing. The capacity of the spray bottles for hair is about 250 ml, and you can keep enough water for use.

✅【Adjustable Nozzle】The water spray bottle for hair has a trigger head design, you just need to gently press the trigger with your fingers. Turn the nozzle can control and adjust to water spray or misting spray mode.

✅【Convenient to Use】After using the empty plastic spray bottle every time, all you have to do is rinse it with water and dry it. It can be used to store hair moisturizer, carpet cleaner, window cleaning, vegetable cleaner, etc.

✅【Wide Application】Water mist spray bottle can be used for cleaning products such as water flowers plant care, household cleaning. Empty sprayer can also be used for hair styling, pets, sprinkle water on clothes which are very useful in your life.

✅【What You Get】You will get 2pcs 250ml plant spray mister bottle, which meets your different needs, lightweight and portable. Suitable for moistening hair as well as spraying and moistening indoor flowers.
